title: Copper hovers near record high amid market tightness
section_path: Copper hovers near record high amid market tightness
section_path_text: Copper hovers near record high amid market tightness
summary:
Main
Sentiment was mixed as traders await details of a US-China trade deal. Copper gained mid more supply side issues. Oil fell as signs of oversupply emerge.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Sentiment was mixed as traders await details of a US-China trade deal. Copper gained mid more supply side issues.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: The amount of crude oil held on tankers that have been stationary for at least 7 days rose to 89.75mbbls as of 24 October. That's up 12% from 80.20mbbls on 17 October.
